Prefix Verb   URI Pattern               Controller#Action
  root GET    /                          controllers/todos#index
completed_todos GET /todos/completed(.:format) controllers/todos#completed
complete_todo PATCH /todos/:id/complete(.:format) controllers/todos#complete
 todos GET    /todos(.:format)           controllers/todos#index
       POST   /todos(.:format)           controllers/todos#create
chat_messages GET /chat_messages(.:format) controllers/chat_messages#index
              POST /chat_messages(.:format) controllers/chat_messages#create
new_user_session GET /users/sign_in(.:format) devise/sessions#new
user_session POST /users/sign_in(.:format) devise/sessions#create
destroy_user_session DELETE /users/sign_out(.:format) devise/sessions#destroy
 users GET    /users(.:format)           controllers/users#index
       POST   /users(.:format)           controllers/users#create
  user PATCH  /users/:id(.:format)       controllers/users#update
       PUT    /users/:id(.:format)       controllers/users#update
       DELETE /users/:id(.:format)       controllers/users#destroy
guest_sign_in POST /session/guest(.:format) controllers/sessions#create_guest
optional_report GET /reports(/:year)(.:format) controllers/todos#optional_report
file GET      /files/*path(.:format)     controllers/todos#file
legacy_health GET /rails-owned-health(.:format) rails_owned/health#show
